purpose: Tier-1 trigger eval: does a query activate `translator` (normalize non-English harness intake to English)? Hardest negatives are English harness requests (which should go straight to their skill) and a non-intake / not-to-English translation.

cases.query: translate this pitch to English for the harness
this requirement is in Vietnamese, normalize it to English before we plan
dịch pitch này sang tiếng Anh
chuẩn hoá tiếng Anh cho yêu cầu này
prepare this non-English intake for the harness
check if this spec input is English
analyze this English pitch into tasks
translate this blog post into French
shape this feature before we build it
run the full harness on this pitch
